steps.title: Identify the passage's three-part structure
steps.content: The passage moves through three stages: defining community science, listing its benefits (public awareness, youth learning, more data), and providing an example study that employed this approach.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content: It identifies a particular approach to research, lists some benefits of that approach, and then mentions a study in which that approach was used. captures this exact sequence: identify the approach, list its benefits, present the example study. The other three options variously misidentify the structure or add details not in the passage. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
